title: OP Totems Datapack
description: Add 8 powerful custom totems to your world — Speed, Regen, Haste, Strength, Health, Luck, TNT Totem + Detonator, and the insane SUPER Totem. Perfect for challenges, survival buffs, or OP fun.
body:
This datapack adds 8 completely new Custom Totems into Minecraft 1.19.2, each with their own special powers.
Pop one into your off-hand and unlock effects like Speed, Strength, Regen, Haste, Luck, Extra Hearts, and even TNT blasting with a Detonator!

Perfect for:

Survival worlds
Challenge videos
SMP buff items
OP fun maps
PvE / PvP modifiers

🟩 Included Totems:

Totem of Speed – Speed II  
Totem of Regeneration – Regen pulses  
Totem of Haste – Haste X   
Totem of Strength – Strength II  
Totem of Health – +20 hearts + Regen  
Totem of Luck – Luck effect  
Totem of TNT – Works with Detonator (right-click to blast, safe for player)  
SUPER Totem – Multiple buffs stacked (Speed, Haste, Regen, Strength, Jump, Luck, Health)  

💥 Detonator

Right-click with the Detonator while holding the TNT Totem in off-hand → drops a TNT blast without hurting you.

🎮 How to Get the Totems

Run: /function ctotems:give/all


This gives you all Totems + the Detonator instantly.

(You can also give them individually using /function ctotems:give/<name>)

💾 Installation

Drop the .zip file into:
.minecraft/saves/<world>/datapacks/

Launch world → run:

/reload

🟣 No Mods Required

This is a pure datapack.
Works on servers, singleplayer, realms (if datapacks allowed).
